arts.ttl: Aston Villa injury latest as Unai Emery issues Amadou Onana and Jacob Ramsey updates before Chelsea clash
arts.sum: The midfielders have both missed Aston Villa’s last two games

arts.ttl: Amorim eyes Chelsea battle for Benfica defender
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants Manchester United to battle Chelsea to sign Tomas Araujo from SL Benfica, according to reports. The Sun have revealed that the defender is well-liked by the Portuguese head coach and the Premier League outfit are looking into the market for a centre-back heading into the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Christopher Nkunku breaks silence after injury scare with message before Aston Villa
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca and his side had Filip Jorgensen to thank for staying in the game with Nkunku providing a sprinkling of stardust when needed. Christopher Nkunku doesn't appear to be in too much bother despite being off with an injury fear in Chelsea's 2-0 win over Heidenheim in the Conference League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: 'I think': Maurizio Sarri makes prediction about Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea certainly have a rich history of Italian managers, which continued in the summer when Enzo Maresca took charge as the new head coach at...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca has ideal Chelsea replacements for two players walking suspension tightrope
arts.sum: Given his injury history too, Maresca has not been unreasonable in continuing to choose Jackson over Nkunku in the league. He has scored 11 times in 19 matches, although five of them have come against Europa Conference League minnows and just one has been notched in 11 Premier League outings.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery drops Aston Villa team news hint and speaks out on fresh 'selection headache'
arts.sum: "Kamara is getting better, he had a small injury," Emery said when asked about his options ahead of facing Chelsea. Boubacar Kamara is expected to start for Aston Villa against Chelsea so long as he gets through Saturday's training session after playing over an hour against Juventus on Wednesday night following a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's jam-packed December fixture list and how rivals compare in top four race
arts.sum: Villa's clash with Chelsea is huge as both teams will have similar aims of finishing in the top four this season and, with Emery's men without a win in seven games in all competitions, it is a big opportunity to pick up a statement win away from home to turn their recent fortunes around. The run begins on Sunday as Unai Emery's side travel to Stamford Bridge to take on an ever-impressive Chelsea side, before facing Brentford on Wednesday and Southampton the following Saturday, both at Villa Park, making it three games in less than a week.

arts.ttl: Italian legend singles out 'incredible' Aston Villa star after Juventus match
arts.sum: Italian football legend Alessandro Del Piero has poured out his praise for one of Aston Villa's most important players after their midweek Champions League draw with Juventus. Should Martínez win the FIFA Best goalkeeper award?

arts.ttl: 'Outrageous' Aston Villa star joins two Premier League rivals on elite list
arts.sum: Aston Villa winger Jaden Philogene has made history after being nominated for the prestigious FIFA Puskas Award which selects the best goal in world football across the season. He has also made history with his nomination with it being the first ever goal scored in the Championship to be shortlisted for the Puskas award.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard makes cheeky Joao Felix transfer remark after Chelsea contacts question
arts.sum: Chelsea icon Frank Lampard joked about signing Joao Felix after his appointment as Coventry City manager. The former midfielder returned to the managerial hotseat for the first time since his second spell in charge at Stamford Bridge after Graham Potter's sacking in April 2023.
